# agent-office third-party assets

Source: https://github.com/harishkotra/agent-office

The dashboard embeds the MIT-licensed character sprite PNGs from `packages/ui/public/assets/characters/` as data URIs inside `csup-dashboard` so localhost:7777 can show moving agent-office-style characters without adding a React/Phaser build pipeline.

License: MIT. See `LICENSE` in this directory.
